chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-180 of 2020 Nadeem-ur-Rehman Versus Cantonment Board Faisal & others Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 24.08.2021 Mr. Tariq Hussain for petitioner. Mr. Ashraf Ali Butt for respondent No.1. -.-.- Learned counsel for respondent No.1 has placed before us copy of a notification whereby under section 84 of the Cantonment Act, 1924 the Federal Government was pleased to empower the Director, Military Land & Cantonments of the region concerned to be an appellate authority to entertain, hear and adjudicate appeals against the assessment or levy of, or against the refusal to refund any tax under the aforesaid Act. This petition pertains to the assessment of annual value for the purpose of property tax hence since forum is available as provided by the federal government in terms of above referred notification, petitioner may exhaust his remedy under the law. Petition as a consequence thereof is dismissed along with pending applications. Judge Judge
